title: Agent Stub (agents/<id>.md)
description: Schema for a generated agent file. The Scaffolder produces these from vocab/roles/ templates + Director team config. Each property maps to a section in the markdown file.

role.description: Role id. Must match the filename (agents/<role>.md) and a role in vocab/roles/.

responsibility.description: One paragraph — what this agent owns in this specific game. Derived from the role's vocabulary definition but narrowed to the game's scope.

inputs.description: What this agent reads before starting. Scoped to this game — only inputs that actually exist for this game, not all possible inputs from the role definition.

artifact.description: File path or document name (e.g. 'CONCEPT.md', 'agents/art.md output').

notes.description: What specifically to look for in this artifact.

outputs.description: What this agent produces. Must be concrete — file paths or specific deliverable names.

current_phase_goal.description: What to do right now, in the current phase. Specific enough that an agent starting cold knows exactly where to begin. Updated by the Scaffolder as phases progress.

hard_constraints.description: Non-negotiable rules for this agent in this game. Drawn from CONCEPT.md scope constraints + any role-specific rules. Optional — omit only if there are genuinely none.

capability_docs.description: Paths to capability docs this agent should read (e.g. 'capabilities/image-gen.md'). Injected by Scaffolder based on probe.js output at scaffold time.
